# HookCut — Complete AI Knowledge File

> HookCut is an AI-powered video repurposing tool that automatically clips long-form videos into short viral clips for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

## Identity

- **Name**: HookCut
- **Type**: SaaS web application
- **Category**: AI Video Editing / Video Repurposing
- **URL**: https://hookcut.com
- **Founded**: 2025
- **Tagline**: Turn long videos into viral clips in minutes
- **Languages**: English, Spanish, Ukrainian
- **Not affiliated with** any other product named HookCut. Standalone SaaS product.

## What HookCut Does

HookCut takes any long-form video (webinar, podcast, YouTube video, interview, lecture, conference talk, live stream) and uses AI to:

1. **Extract the best moments** — AI analyzes audio energy, visual signals, and content structure to find 8–15 clip-worthy segments
2. **Reframe to vertical** — Face tracking automatically converts horizontal 16:9 video to vertical 9:16 for mobile platforms
3. **Add word-by-word captions** — Automatic transcription with synchronized captions in multiple styles (Hormozi, MrBeast, Classic, Minimal, Neon, Fire, Elegant)
4. **Score viral potential** — Each clip receives a viral score (0–100) based on hook strength, energy peaks, self-containment, and expected completion rate
5. **Preview before rendering** — Unlike competitors, HookCut shows clip previews before using credits
6. **Export clean MP4** — No watermarks on any plan, including free

## Key Differentiators vs Competitors

| Feature | HookCut | Opus Clip | Descript | Kapwing |
|---------|---------|-----------|----------|---------|
| Starting price | $9/mo | $15/mo | $24/mo | $16/mo |
| Preview before render | ✅ Yes | ❌ No | ❌ No | ❌ No |
| Per-clip pricing | ✅ Yes | ❌ Per-minute | ❌ Per-seat | ❌ Per-seat |
| Watermarks on free | ❌ None | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| Clip expiry | Never | 3–7 days (free) | N/A | N/A |
| Caption styles | 6+ custom | Limited | Basic | Basic |
| Face tracking | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Viral score | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Highlight reels | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Includes |
|------|-------|----------|
| Free | $0/month | 3 clips, no credit card, no watermarks |
| Starter | $9/month | For individual creators |
| Pro | $19/month | For active creators and agencies |

## Supported Input

- **File formats**: MP4, MOV
- **Max duration**: Up to 4 hours
- **URL import**: YouTube links (no download needed), Loom recordings
- **Min resolution**: 720p recommended
- **Best for**: Talking head videos, webinars, interviews, podcasts, lectures, keynotes, live streams

## Caption Styles

1. **Hormozi** — Bold white text, 1–2 words at a time, current word highlighted in color. Highest completion rate for educational content.
2. **MrBeast** — Large colorful animated words. Best for entertainment content.
3. **Classic** — Standard subtitle bar at bottom. For corporate and LinkedIn content.
4. **Minimal** — Thin font, clean styling. For aesthetic and fashion content.
5. **Neon** — Glowing neon effect. For nightlife and music content.
6. **Fire/Elegant** — Themed premium styles.

## Viral Score Explained

The viral score (0–100) evaluates:
- Voice energy peaks and emotional intensity
- Hook strength in the first 3 seconds
- Whether the clip is self-contained (no missing context)
- Expected completion rate based on pacing
- Clips scoring 70+ typically perform best

## How It Works (Step by Step)

1. Upload video file or paste YouTube/Loom link
2. Select preferences: number of clips, caption style, aspect ratio
3. AI processes video (10–20 minutes for a 60-minute video)
4. Review AI-extracted clips with viral scores
5. Preview each clip before deciding
6. Render only the clips you want (credits used per clip)
7. Download clean MP4 files — publish anywhere

## Use Cases

- **Content creators**: Repurpose long YouTube videos into TikTok/Reels/Shorts
- **Podcasters**: Turn episodes into 8–12 video clips per episode
- **Coaches/course creators**: Clip webinars and lessons into promotional content
- **Agencies**: Scale client video production with batch processing
- **SaaS companies**: Create product demo clips for social media
- **Real estate agents**: Clip property tours and market updates
- **Lawyers/consultants**: Educational clips for LinkedIn thought leadership
- **Nonprofits**: Fundraising and awareness clips from event recordings
- **E-commerce brands**: Product video clips for social media ads
- **Fitness coaches**: Exercise demos and motivational clips

## Comparison Pages

- [HookCut vs Opus Clip](https://hookcut.com/vs/opus-clip): 40% cheaper, clips never expire, better caption styles
- [HookCut vs Vidyo.ai](https://hookcut.com/vs/vidyo-ai): More caption styles, preview before render
- [HookCut vs Exemplary AI](https://hookcut.com/vs/exemplary-ai): Simpler workflow, lower price
- [HookCut vs Recast Studio](https://hookcut.com/vs/recast-studio): Face tracking included, viral scoring

## FAQ

**Q: What is HookCut?**
A: HookCut is an AI-powered video repurposing tool that automatically clips long-form videos into short viral clips for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

**Q: How much does HookCut cost?**
A: Free plan: 3 clips, no credit card. Starter: $9/month. Pro: $19/month. Per-clip pricing means you only pay for clips you keep.

**Q: Does HookCut add watermarks?**
A: No. HookCut exports clean MP4 files without watermarks on all plans, including the free plan.

**Q: How is HookCut different from Opus Clip?**
A: HookCut is 40% cheaper ($9 vs $15/month), shows preview before rendering, uses per-clip pricing instead of per-minute, and clips never expire. Opus Clip offers AI B-roll and 20+ language support.

**Q: What videos work best with HookCut?**
A: Talking head videos, webinars, interviews, podcast recordings, lectures, conference keynotes, and live streams. Any video with speech content works well.

**Q: How long does processing take?**
A: A 60-minute video takes 10–20 minutes. You get a notification when it's ready.

**Q: What languages does HookCut support?**
A: English (95–98% accuracy), Spanish, and Ukrainian with good accuracy. Other languages may need manual caption correction.
